text:
It was dusk in a small town by the sea. The sun dipped below the horizon, casting long shadows through the narrow lane.

A man strolled along the cobblestone path, his gaze lost in thought. He wore old brown shoes that clacked soothingly whenever he moved.

Suddenly, his attention was captured by something sparkling at the end of the road. Approaching with cautious curiosity, he paused beside a particularly odd-looking tree. Its branches hung heavily with hundreds of glassy orbs, shimmering with an ethereal glow.

A small girl, wearing pink sparkly boots that sparkled just like the tree's decorations, tugged at his sleeve.

"Come look!" she exclaimed. "All those stars?"

He followed her up the crooked path, the glassy orbs casting curious glints in the softening light. They reached the crown of the tree, nestled beneath a weeping willow.

The first orb she reached out for broke into twinkling laughter, scattering tiny silvery
